zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda of Mecklenburg於大約1210年出生時，她的父親Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg42歲，母親Kristina Sverkersdotter26歲。她和Sambor II Duke of Pomerania至少有3個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1270年11月23日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda of Mecklenburg于大约1210年出生时，她的父亲Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg42岁，母亲Kristina Sverkersdotter26岁。她和Sambor II Duke of Pomerania至少有3个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1270年11月23日之后。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Mecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of this name in northern Germany, so called from Old Saxon mikil ‘big, great’ + burg ‘castle’. Amongst Jews this may have been acquired alternatively as an artificial name.

variants.name: Mekelburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Helmut.
German: variant of Meckelburg, itself a variant of Mecklenburg .

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda of Mecklenburg was born about 1210, her father, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, was 42 and her mother, Kristina Sverkersdotter, was 26. She had at least 3 sons and 6 daughters with Sambor II Duke of Pomerania. She died after 23 November 1270.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda of Mecklenburg est née environ 1210, son père, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Kristina Sverkersdotter, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles avec Sambor II Duke of Pomerania. Elle est décédée après 23 novembre 1270.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda of Mecklenburg um 1210 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg 42 und ihre Mutter Kristina Sverkersdotter 26. Sie hatte mit Sambor II Duke of Pomerania mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb nach 23. November 1270.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda of Mecklenburg è nata il circa 1210, sua padre, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Kristina Sverkersdotter, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie con Sambor II Duke of Pomerania. Morì dopo il 23 novembre 1270.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda of Mecklenburgが約1210年に生まれた時，父Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburgは42歳，母Kristina Sverkersdotterは26歳であった。彼女はSambor II Duke of Pomeraniaとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1270年11月23日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda of Mecklenburg(이)가 대략 1210년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kristina Sverkersdotter(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Sambor II Duke of Pomerania(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 11월 23일 이후 사망했다.

mn.około 1210 r.–Aft 23 November 1270: ойролцоогоор 1210 он–1270 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 23–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda of Mecklenburg nasceu aproximadamente 1210, seu pai, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Kristina Sverkersdotter, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas com Sambor II Duke of Pomerania. Ela faleceu após 23 de novembro de 1270.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda of Mecklenburg родилась около 1210 г., её отцу по имени Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Kristina Sverkersdotter, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей от Sambor II Duke of Pomerania. Она умерла после 23 ноябрь 1270 г.

sm.około 1210 r.–Aft 23 November 1270: e tusa o le 1210–ina ua ma'ea le 23 Novema 1270

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda of Mecklenburg nació aproximadamente 1210, su papá, Prince Heinrich II Burwin of Mecklenburg, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Kristina Sverkersdotter, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas con Sambor II Duke of Pomerania. Murió después de 23 de noviembre de 1270.
